steps.expression: (() => { const keys = ['reportBuilder.state.demoReportBuilder.demoReportBuilderWindow', 'reportBuilder.state.demoReportBuilder']; return keys.some((key) => { const raw = window.localStorage.getItem(key); if (!raw) { return false; } try { const parsed = JSON.parse(raw); return parsed?.explorationSession?.sourceRef?.kind === 'reportBuilder.tableRow' && parsed?.explorationSession?.sourceRef?.contextLabel === '2026-05-01 • Display'; } catch (_) { return false; } }); })()

(() => { const keys = ['reportBuilder.state.demoReportBuilder.demoReportBuilderWindow', 'reportBuilder.state.demoReportBuilder']; return keys.some((key) => { const raw = window.localStorage.getItem(key); if (!raw) { return true; } try { const parsed = JSON.parse(raw); return !parsed?.explorationSession; } catch (_) { return false; } }); })()
